title: sebastiania hispida var. laeta
intro: Sebastiania hispida var. laeta, also known as the 'Saraca' or 'Laeta', is a plant species belonging to the Euphorbiaceae family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to reduce inflammation, fever, and pain. The plant is rich in flavonoids and saponins, which contribute to its various health benefits, including antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, helping to protect against oxidative stress, improve immune function, and prevent infections. In traditional medicine, the plant is prepared as an infusion, decoction, or tincture, and is often used to treat conditions such as fever, cough, and respiratory infections.
